title: SACRAMENTO

raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The UC admissions process is vulnerable to manipulation by well-connected individuals.",
    "This vulnerability undermines the equality of opportunity in the UC system and the State of California.",
    "The State Audit revealed issues separate from back-door exceptions related to the 'Varsity Blues' investigations.",
    "The report flagged 64 questionable admissions decisions.",
    "Some UC campuses have major inconsistencies among application reviewers.",
    "Some campuses lack basic criteria to support admissions decisions.",
    "The audit indicates that affluent and powerful individuals may influence admissions at public universities.",
    "High-achieving students from difficult circumstances are denied opportunities due to inequity of access."
  ]
}
```
